create_time.description: Timestamp for when the instance was created, useful for auditing and tracking.

creator.description: Email or identifier of the user who created the instance, useful for ownership tracking.

effective_labels.description: Final set of labels applied to the instance, useful for categorization and filtering.

health_info.description: Detailed health diagnostics of the instance, useful for monitoring and troubleshooting.

health_state.description: Current health status of the instance, useful for identifying issues quickly.

id.description: Unique identifier for the instance, essential for referencing in other resources or APIs.

proxy_uri.description: URI for accessing the instance via proxy, useful for secure connections.

state.description: Current operational state of the instance, useful for determining availability.

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform configuration, useful for organizing and managing resources.

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last update to the instance, useful for tracking changes.

upgrade_history.description: Record of upgrades performed on the instance, useful for maintenance tracking.
